display_name: Alpha Sherman Meshy Single File GLB
texture_pack_mode: data-uri images embedded in GLB JSON for Meshy importer compatibility
note: Player-character Alpha Sherman. Use this file for Meshy upload; data-uri textures plus geometry decals preserve identity if importer drops PBR.

red_build.observed: Muddy/gold noisy stretched texture, Alpha markings effectively absent, blue/black slab artifacts visible, camera/UI crop makes it unusable.
red_build.cause: Geometry/material decal workaround violated Alpha texture architecture; not a UV-aware model texture/retexture result.
